description: Engineering stress-strain curves for Fe-28Mn-9Al-0.8C lightweight steel strips in as-cast condition (Figure 4a), showing varying responses for 0Cu, 3Cu, and 5Cu compositions.

Engineering stress-strain curves for Fe-28Mn-9Al-0.8C lightweight steel strips heat treated at 500°C for 6 h (Figure 4b), showing variations in strength and elongation for 0Cu, 3Cu, and 5Cu compositions.

Engineering stress-strain curves for Fe-28Mn-9Al-0.8C lightweight steel strips heat treated at 500°C for 20 h (Figure 4c), demonstrating the mechanical performance of 0Cu, 3Cu, and 5Cu compositions under long-term heat treatment.
